Modifications.Value: Transfers mana between the Scylla and a target. Drains <Vkpt,DataB1> mana per second from an enemy, or transfers <Vkpt,DataE1> mana per second to an ally.|n|nSiphon Mana can push the Scylla's mana over its maximum value, though excess mana drains off rapidly if not used.|nLasts 6 seconds.
